dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9009 IH: Firearm Freedom Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Patronis (for himself, Mr. Clyde, Mr. Wied, and Mr. Cloud) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To repeal the Hughes Amendment to the Firearm Owners’ Protection Act.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Firearm Freedom Act of 2026.

section.header: Repeal of ban on possession or transfer of machineguns
section.text: Section 922 of title 18, United States Code, is amended by striking subsection (o).
